channel.title: Forgebook
channel.description: A notebook-first AI cookbook. Jupyter notebook examples and tutorials.

item.title: Create Your First Agent (Part 1)
item.description: Step-by-step tutorial to deploy gpt-5-mini on Microsoft Foundry, create an AI agent with Web Search, and test it — all from the Foundry portal. Part 1 of 4.
item.author: nicholasdbrady
